headline: ICLR Earnings Reset: What the Accounting Probe Changed
summary: ICON plc details an accounting restatement, flags control weaknesses, and frames 2026 as a reset year amid mix-driven earnings swings.

headline: Why Is Penumbra (PEN) Down 1.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Penumbra (PEN) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
